title: Polymorphic light eruption - NHS
text:
et polymorphic light eruption if you're under 40 years old, a woman or you have white skin.
Boys aged 5 to 14 years are more likely to get a type of polymorphic light eruption called juvenile spring eruption that affects the ears.
Page last reviewed: 10 June 2025
Next review due: 10 June 2028
